name: Hong Fok Corporation Limited
summary: Hong Fok Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the investment, construction, development, and management of properties in Singapore and Hong Kong. The company develops residential and other properties; invests in office, shop, restaurant, retail, residential, and commercial properties; and provides property maintenance services. It also offers investment trading and investment management services. The company was incorporated in 1967 and is based in Singapore.
